results_page_composition.notes: Section order confirmed: (1) ResultsInvestigationSpine:545, (2) ResultsBodyOverview:555, (3) BalancedSystemsSummary:562, (4) PrimaryFindingAndWhy:569, (5) WhyThisLeadWonSection:576, (6) InterpretationPatternsSection:583, (7) SystemUnderstandingSection:590. investigationSpine memo at lines 164-175 derives focusLine + idlRetailLabel + idlSubtitle — idlRetailLabel already in scope and can be passed to SystemUnderstandingSection at line 590 without new computation.

source_cross_reference.notes: Duplication root cause identified from source code: (A) Spine.focusLine = ensureTerminalPunctuation(extractFirstSentence(leadSource)) where leadSource = primary_concern||top_hypothesis_line||key_findings[0]. (B) BodyOverview.primary = extractFirstSentence(same leadSource) + frontend suffix. Identical first sentence, different suffix only. (C) PrimaryFinding.lead = 'Main finding: ' + firstSentence(same concern/hyp) — same content with a different label prefix. All three present the same backend sentence to the user in near-identical form within the first four sections. IDL duplication: Spine shows first IDL record (retail_display_label + subtitle), InterpretationPatternsSection renders the full same first card immediately after.
